title: Visa exemption 60 days confirmed at Suvarnabhumi - Trip Report
content: Just landed at Suvarnabhumi on a US passport. Immigration officer stamped 60 days without question. Process was smooth, no issues. They did ask to see my return ticket.

title: Thailand Digital Nomad Guide | Nomad List
content: Most digital nomads stay on visa exemptions. The 60-day stamp is being consistently granted since November 2024. Border runs to Malaysia are common but the 2-land-entry limit is increasingly enforced.
